CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan Sherwood, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The Court was notified that this case has settled. Therefore, there being no objection, the tentative ruling is vacated and PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's Motion For Order: Truth Of Matters Specified In Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted is ordered OFF CALENDAR. Case settled.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
